further_reading.title: Building Effective AI Agents
further_reading.why_relevant: Explains the difference between controlled workflows and more autonomous agents, which maps directly to this module's system-design framing.

further_reading.title: Structured model outputs
further_reading.why_relevant: Shows how schema-shaped outputs make validation, routing, and predictable failure handling easier in real AI features.

further_reading.title: AI Risk Management Framework
further_reading.why_relevant: Provides a practical risk and control framework for guardrails, review, measurement, and governance around AI systems.

notes: No inline-citation claims identified. The module is predominantly pedagogical and uses hypothetical product examples rather than assertions about real incidents, named standards, vendor-version behavior, statistics, or dated facts. The few concrete examples (support summarizer, release-note generator, refund workflow) are framed as design illustrations, not real-world factual claims requiring inline support.
